product_name: LinkedIn Content OS: 30 Days of Posts in 2 Hours
tagline: Turn any idea into a month of scroll-stopping LinkedIn content with AI — in one sitting.
description:
Stop staring at a blank LinkedIn post. This system hands you the exact AI prompts, content frameworks, and copy templates that turn one idea into a full month of high-performing posts — in under 2 hours.

Inside: 7 battle-tested content formats (story, insight, carousel, controversy, list, question, case study), 40+ fill-in prompts for ChatGPT and Claude, a 30-day editorial calendar you can fill in 90 minutes, hooks that triple engagement, and a repeatable weekly workflow that keeps your feed alive without burnout.

For founders, freelancers, and creators who know LinkedIn matters but never have time — this is the operating system that makes consistent posting effortless.

content_outline.chapter: 01 — The LinkedIn Algorithm Decoded (What Actually Gets Seen in 2026)
bullets: How the feed ranking works in 2026 — dwell time, early saves, comment velocity
The 3 content types the algorithm loves (and 2 it actively suppresses)
Best posting windows by industry and audience type
Why most 'tips' are outdated and what the data actually shows
The 90-day compound effect: why consistency beats virality

content_outline.chapter: 02 — Your Content Pillars: Building a 3-Topic Strategy
bullets: How to find your 3 authority pillars in 20 minutes
The AI prompt for extracting unique angles from your expertise
Balancing value, story, and soft-sell content
Positioning framework: what to own vs. what to share
Validating your pillars with a competitor gap analysis

content_outline.chapter: 03 — The 7 Content Formats That Dominate LinkedIn
bullets: Format 1: The Story Post — structure, hook, and emotional arc
Format 2: The Insight Post — contrarian takes that spark debate
Format 3: The List Post — skimmable value that gets bookmarked
Format 4: The Question Post — triggers comments and algorithm boost
Format 5: The Case Study — proof-based posts that build trust
Format 6: The Carousel — step-by-step guides that get saved
Format 7: The Controversy Post — how to provoke without burning bridges

content_outline.chapter: 04 — 40+ AI Prompts: Write a Month of Posts in One Sitting
bullets: Story post prompts: inject personal experience into professional lessons
Insight prompts: use AI to flip conventional wisdom in your niche
List post prompts: rapid-fire value extraction from any topic
Hook-first prompts: generating 10 opening lines per post idea
Repurposing prompts: turning one idea into 5 different post angles
Full 30-day prompt sequence with day-by-day topic slots

content_outline.chapter: 05 — The Hook Vault: 60 Opening Lines That Stop the Scroll
bullets: Anatomy of a LinkedIn hook — the pattern that works every time
15 curiosity hooks (readers can't scroll past these)
15 bold claim hooks (works for insight and controversy formats)
15 story openers (personal, vulnerable, specific)
15 question hooks (drives comments within the first hour)
How to adapt any hook to your voice in 30 seconds with AI
The fill-in-the-blank calendar template (topic + format + hook for each day)
Week 1: Authority establishment week — lead with expertise
Week 2: Story week — let people see behind the work
Week 3: Engagement week — questions, polls, hot takes
Week 4: Conversion week — subtle offers, case studies, social proof
How to reuse this system month after month with minimal rework

content_outline.chapter: 07 — The 2-Hour Weekly Workflow (Stay Consistent Without Burning Out)
bullets: The Sunday session: 90-minute content batch that powers your whole week
Capturing ideas on the fly — the daily 5-minute habit
Scheduling tools and the optimal post frequency for your goals
Measuring what matters: engagement rate, profile views, DMs — not just likes
When to break from the system and go off-schedule for viral moments
Building a content bank so you always have backup posts

personas: Freelancers and consultants building a client pipeline on LinkedIn
Founders growing their personal brand alongside their company
Creators and coaches who want authority without posting every day
